posts.author: JayGenXer
posts.text: Calgary Stampede. The biggest, most iconic Canadian rodeo on earth. Cowboys, bucking bulls, chuckwagons, country music, Western heritage for over 100 years. Now? Raf-Saperra on stage doing Punjabi hip-hop fusion while the crowd throws up the "oh oh oh oh" like it's a Desi concert. "This is a Canadian rodeo??" Exactly 🤦🏻‍♂️ The woman in this video is asking the question a lot of us are thinking. Traditional events that defined this country are getting completely transformed. You used to go to the Stampede for rodeo and country. Now it's whatever the biggest "diverse" act of the moment is. This is what years of mass immigration + "celebrate everything except the founding culture" gets you. Canada isn't being preserved. It's being replaced piece by piece even at the Stampede. R.I.P. the old Canada 🇨🇦

posts.author: babayagatwt
posts.text: I still can’t figure out why Gemini struggles to compete with Claude and GPT. - Owns Chrome - Backed by Android - Stores most search results - Holds ~95% search history - Google has the biggest user data - Even incognito data isn’t fully private So what’s the problem?

posts.author: MartienBall
posts.text: Argentina are officially the first nation in World Cup HISTORY to reach the semi-finals without facing a single Top 10 ranked team. Must be a coincidence… of course.

posts.author: DaniMayakovski
posts.text: En EEUU, unos turistas molestaron a un bisonte en época de celo en el parque natural de Yellowstone, desobedeciendo las órdenes de los guardas de no acercarse mucho al animal y no bajar del coche. El búfalo pilló al turista y lo hizo volar, dejen a los animales en paz y libres.

posts.author: bayraktar_1love
posts.text: Russian mobile fire group training goes wrong while using a YakB-12.7 rotary machine gun developed for a Mi-24 helicopter mount This is what happens when an aircraft rotary gun with brutal angular recoil is treated like a regular ground weapon. They ignored that fact, slapped it onto a ground setup for a mobile fire group, and assumed it would work like a regular stationary machine gun. (Full version, no watermarks)

posts.author: michaelmovie
posts.text: 1 legend. 1 story. $1 billion at the box office. To every fan who bought a ticket, sang along, dressed up, and returned to the big screen again and again: thank you. This milestone belongs to you. #MichaelMovie

posts.author: mog_russEN
posts.text: DID RUSSIA JUST ELIMINATE WARMONGER LINDSEY GRAHAM IN KIEV? The US Senator who famously called killing Russians "the best investment we ever made" has died at 70 following a "sudden illness" right after his trip to Ukraine. The 48-Hour DEATH TIMELINE is too wild to ignore: 👇 1- Graham meets Zelensky and tours a "hidden" drone manufacturing facility in Kiev. 2- Hours later, the Russian MoD launches a devastating missile attack, completely OBLITERATING that exact factory. 3- Simultaneously, Russian precision missiles leveled a high-profile hotel in Kiev packed with top NATO commanders—where Graham was reportedly staying! 4- Graham instantly "dies suddenly" right after returning home. He wanted to bring "hellish sanctions" to Russia, but it looks like he went straight to hell instead! Did a Russian strike catch him in the drone factory or the NATO hotel, or did someone in Washington send him there knowing the missiles were coming?

posts.author: TrungTPhan
posts.text: Fox did a slow-mo replay of the ball hitting camera wire before Bellingham’s equalizer against Norway. Completely changes trajectory. FIFA says no contact because the “Connected Ball heartbeat sensor” showed nothing. Peak sports optimization gone wrong.
